mainEntity.name: Can I be fired in Utah if I'm out of work for a neck injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: You cannot be fired in retaliation for filing a claim. However, Utah is an at-will state, meaning an employer can fire you for other reasons. Your workers comp benefits should continue even if you are terminated.
